Inside the platform

One platform for your whole search picture.

Classic search, AI answers, and the brand signals behind both, read together with the fix already drafted. Here are six of the places you'll work; there's a lot more once you're in.

01

Data Pipeline

Your search data, your crawl and the analysers in one live pipeline: the single source of truth everything else reads from.

02

Analyser Workspaces

Seven analysers watch your site around the clock and hand you a ranked, judged queue of fixes: cannibalisation, decay, index bloat and more, each one already drafted.

03

Intelligence Hub

Performance, the competitive gap and rising demand in one command centre, with an AI strategist that's already read your data and knows where the money is.

04

Brand and AI Visibility New

See how AI answer engines describe you, who they recommend instead and which sources they trust. Then close the gap with a digital PR plan and a dedicated strategist.

05

Content Studio

Turn any finding into research, a brief and a publish-ready draft, placed on the exact page and section it belongs. Strategy to shipped without leaving the platform.

06

Reports

Client-ready reporting that writes itself in the voice of whoever's reading: exec, practitioner or board. Export to PDF, deck or workbook in a click.

Six of many. Join the waiting list to explore the rest →

The pilot programme

See your search the way Searchscope does.

One crawl, one set of data, and every room working from it. Set up for your site, with our search team alongside you. We onboard the pilot in small cohorts.

Join the waiting list →

No card, no obligation. Just early access as places open up.
